title: Spook-tacular Black & Yellow Halloween Printed Fright Tape - 3m (1 Pc.) - Creepy Ambience & Spine-chilling Thrills - Perfect for Haunted House Decor
features: CREEPY HALLOWEEN PRINT: Spook-tacular black & yellow fright tape features a haunting "Caution: Enter if you dare" message - perfect for transforming your space into a spine-chilling experience this Halloween season.

DURABLE MATERIAL: Made from high-quality, long-lasting material ensuring your fright tape withstands even the most spine-chilling and horrifying events. No need to worry about it tearing or fading—enjoy a creepy ambience all night long.

HAUNTING AMBIENCE: Create the perfect haunted house or Halloween party vibe with this 3m x 3m (1 pc.) printed fright tape. Add a chilling touch to doors, windows, or walls and watch as your guests get goosebumps!

PERFECT FOR HALLOWEEN PARTIES: Whether you're planning a haunted house, spooky soiree, or a terrifying get-together, this fright tape is the ultimate decoration to delight your thrill-seeking party-goers and ensure an unforgettable night.

EASY TO USE & REUSABLE: Effortlessly apply the Spook-tacular fright tape to any surface and enjoy the terrifying transformation. Strong yet easy to remove— reuse this eerie decoration for multiple Halloween events and create chilling ambience year after year.
description: Our Halloween Printed Fright Tape is perfect for your guests to get in the frightful mood for Halloween.
